scripts.// desenvolvimento: Rotina leve para codar e testar tela/fluxo
scripts.// checagem local: Checks rapidos, sem build nem auditorias longas
scripts.typecheck:deps: next typegen && node scripts/ensure-next-types.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.ci.json --noEmit --incremental false
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.backup:all:safe: npm run backup:local && npm run backup:db:schema
scripts.ci:audit: npm run audit:security && npm run audit:service-role && npm run audit:admin-actions && npm run audit:admin-client-inventory && npm run audit:admin-surface && npm run audit:api-guards && npm run audit:critical-routes && npm run audit:no-wildcard-select && npm run audit:database-contract && npm run audit:architecture-boundaries
scripts.ci:validate: npm run ci:lint && npm run ci:typecheck && npm run ci:audit && npm run ci:build
scripts.// release: Validacao pesada antes de promover producao
scripts.release:validate: npm run ci:validate && npm run e2e:proxy && npm run e2e:sales
scripts.release:smoke: npm run e2e:proxy && npm run e2e:sales
scripts.// banco: Auditoria de migrations, RPCs e contrato Supabase
scripts.// monitoramento: Auditorias de seguranca operacional e observabilidade
scripts.launch:validate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run db:audit && npm run audit:service-role && npm run audit:admin-actions && npm run audit:admin-client-inventory && npm run audit:admin-surface && npm run audit:api-guards && npm run audit:critical-routes && npm run audit:no-wildcard-select && npm run audit:architecture-boundaries && npm run audit:launch-readiness && npm run build
